backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that logo image references were updated across Navbar, Footer, HeroSection, and AboutSection components with correct path, alt text, dimensions, and object-fit constraints.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, noting logo path updates to `/assets/generated/logo.dim_512x512.png` and contact detail changes across components.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Growth Byte Digital React app, mounting the app at `#root` and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that tracks scroll state and composes all landing page sections (Navbar, Hero, Services, About, WhyChooseUs, Contact, Footer) into a single page layout.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Two-column about section displaying the logo at 224–288px with object-fit contain, floating ROI and client stat cards, and descriptive copy about Growth Byte Digital on a navy background.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section with a form, phone/email/location info links, a WhatsApp CTA button linking to number 6265381119, and a free consultation header on a navy background.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Full-width footer displaying the logo at 60px height, agency description, phone/email contact links, social media icons, quick navigation links, and a copyright line.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section for Growth Byte Digital with a logo, headline, tagline, CTA buttons (scroll to contact/services), and stat counters. Includes decorative background blobs and a scroll indicator.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with logo, smooth-scroll nav links, a 'Get Free Audit' CTA, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
Displays five digital marketing service cards (Social Media, Meta Ads, Google Ads, Lead Generation, Local Marketing) in a responsive grid, plus a dark CTA card that scrolls to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUsSecti: Renders a 2×2 grid of numbered reason cards explaining the agency's advantages: result-driven strategy, affordability, data optimization, and local expertise.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) via React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout, identity state, and status flags, backed by DFINITY's AuthClient and exposed via a React context provider and hook.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Poppins fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for the navy/white/yellow brand theme in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then mounts to the DOM.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color tokens (using oklch), typography/container-queries/animate plugins, custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), border radius, box shadows, and keyframe animations for the project's design system.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording the current version, architectural notes, known issues, existing features, and new feature requests for the Growth Byte Digital agency landing page built with React/Tailwind.
